subcodes.first_line: O Khusraw of gracious nature! From the day of our separation, the feelings of love have been continuously flowing, and thou art ever in my thoughts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خسرو خوشخو از روزیکه مفارقت حاصل همیشه احساسات محبت متواصل همواره بیاد تو
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
